title: Crash committing multi-file transaction including temp file
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table (temp_id INTEGER, temp_value VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO temp_table (temp_id, temp_value) VALUES (1, 'Temporary Data');
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) SELECT temp_value, CAST(temp_id AS DOUBLE) FROM temp_table WHERE temp_id IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Committing multi-file transaction with temp file
